Instrução:
Welcome to Stage 3 of the experiment. This software is designed to test sequential object selection based on predefined criteria. Please follow the instructions carefully to ensure accurate data collection.

Getting Started
The experiment will display a grid of objects. Your task is to select them in the correct sequence.
Only the correct object in the sequence will count as a valid selection. Incorrect selections will be logged.
The number of objects in the sequence will be predefined and displayed on the screen.
Selection Process
Click on the object that you believe is the next correct choice in the sequence.
If your selection is correct, it will be recorded, and you will move to the next object.
If incorrect, an error will be logged, but you may continue selecting until the correct one is chosen.
Clues and Completion
Periodically, a clue overlay may appear to assist you in identifying the correct object.
The experiment ends when all objects have been correctly selected, or if a termination condition (e.g., max attempts, time limit) is met.
Final Log
A detailed log of your attempts, including the total experiment duration, will be generated for review.
